g.title: register
g.text: → id encodes kind in top 4 bits;

g.title: register_security
g.text: v1: at most one active provider per kernel

g.title: subscribe
g.text: → unsubscribe(id) routes by tag in id top bits

g.title: for_each
g.text: per-shard read lock; visitor returns 0 to continue

g.title: config_get
g.text: config_get(key, type, index, out, ud, free)
→ kernel rejects type mismatch with INVALID_ENVELOPE

g.title: discipline
g.text: · single ABI slot per primitive shape
· KIND enum (or channel id, or type tag) selects routing
· adding a new kind = enum value + kernel side; ABI stable
· ~21 functional slots on host_api_t today + 8 reserved
